channel.title: Field Glass Notes
channel.description: Fresh takes for backyard birders and weekend twitchers.

item.title: Ask the forge: your migration questions, answered
item.description: Straight answers to the migration questions backyard birders and weekend twitchers keep asking, minus the hedging.

item.title: The quiet upgrade: small tweaks in feeders with outsized returns
item.description: No purchases, no overhauls — the modest feeders adjustments that backyard birders and weekend twitchers report mattering most.

item.title: Myth vs. reality: backyard feeder setup
item.description: The persistent myths around backyard feeder setup, stress-tested against what backyard birders and weekend twitchers actually report.

item.title: A weekend project: level up your optics in two hours
item.description: One contained, satisfying optics project for backyard birders — start Saturday morning, done by lunch.

item.title: Community pulse: what r/Ornithology is debating this week
item.description: The arguments, consensus shifts, and quietly useful threads from the migration community this week.

item.title: The feeders checklist: run this before you spend
item.description: Seven questions that separate a justified feeders purchase from an expensive mood.

item.title: Five mistakes everyone makes in their first month of id skills
item.description: The most common early stumbles in id skills, and the cheap corrections that fix them for backyard birders and weekend twitchers.

item.title: "bird id apps compared" in practice: a real-world field test
item.description: We put the most-repeated advice about bird id apps compared through a month of actual use. Some of it survived.
